# truenas_certificate (Data Source)

Provides information about a certificate on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_certificate" "wildcard" {
  name = "wildcard-example-com"
}

output "cert_id" {
  value = data.truenas_certificate.wildcard.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The certificate name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `digest_algorithm` (String) The digest algorithm (e.g., SHA256).
- `dn` (String) The certificate distinguished name.
- `expired` (Boolean) Whether the certificate has expired.
- `id` (Number) The certificate ID.
- `issuer` (String) The certificate issuer (common name).
- `key_length` (Number) The key length in bits.
- `key_type` (String) The key type (RSA, EC).
- `san` (String) Subject Alternative Names (comma-separated).
- `valid_from` (String) Certificate validity start date.
- `valid_until` (String) Certificate validity end date.
